name: AnyType
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Hey iOS Community!
We’re thrilled to bring you a foundational update and a major shift in how you organize content in Anytype. We’re introducing a more structured, consistent and intuitive way to work with Types.
Now, layouts and properties are defined directly within a Type, and all associated objects automatically follow those settings – making your workspace more predictable and easier to manage.
Meet the new Anytype


Relations are now Properties
What were previously called Relations are now called Properties. Properties are defined at the Type level, not per individual object. While you can still edit property values on each object, the overall structure comes from its Type.
Properties that were once unique to individual objects will now appear as local properties. You can choose to keep them as-is or add them to the object’s Type if you’d like to make them consistent across similar objects.

Types Define Structure
Types now control the layout and properties of all associated objects. When you create an object of a certain Type, it will follow the same layout and include the same properties as others of that Type.

Templates Focus on Content
Templates no longer define properties or layout. They inherit the object’s settings and control the content, primarily organizing blocks.

Set is now called Query
More than just a rename – each Type page comes with a built-in inline Query, making it easier to access and organize a list of all related objects.

Special Icons for Types 
You can now assign custom icons at the Type level, choosing from a dedicated collection to clearly distinguish Types from objects.


Quality of Life Improvements

Automatic Widget Creation
When a new first object of Type is created, a dedicated widget is automatically added to your Home Screen. It displays a subset of objects of that Type within the space, giving you quick access without extra setup.
Widgets are optional – once removed, it won’t reappear unless you add it manually.

Create Objects from Widgets
As a complement to automatic widget creation, you can now create objects from widgets using the plus (+) button.

Unified Search
We’ve reimagined the search experience by merging All Objects into the Global Search. You can now search across Pages, Lists, Media, Bookmarks and Files using a single search bar. Tabs help you filter results by object type, and both your selected tab and search query are remembered between sessions.

New Settings Design
Settings got a full makeover with a cleaner structure and clearer navigation for setup and customization. Also, you can now manage Object Types directly from the Space Settings.

Open Bookmarks in Browser
Opening a bookmark now takes you directly to the URL – not into the editor. On iOS, bookmarks open within the in-app browser, keeping you inside Anytype while still viewing web content.

Better Link Handling
Object links are now easier to share and open, even outside the app. When you tap Copy Link from the object menu, you’ll get a shareable HTTPS link. If the app is already installed, or the link is opened inside Anytype, it takes you straight to the object with no redirection. For shared spaces, the link also includes an invite so others can join instantly.



Minor Fixes
Fixed: MP3 files now load properly.
Fixed: PDFs now open as expected.
Fixed: Toggle arrow expands blocks with empty content.
Improved: Image, Video and File pickers now open automatically when adding a corresponding Media block.

name: Bumble BFF
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Exciting news—we've updated Bumble to make your dating experience feel more meaningful, intentional, and safe. Here's what's new: 

– Find people who match your vibe: Check Discover to see a daily selection of your most compatible people, based on similar interests, intentions, and communities.

– Show them you're the real deal: With ID Verification, you can upload a government-issued ID and get a badge on your profile. Plus, you can ask your match to do it, too.  

– Keep your friends in the loop: Share Date lets you send the details of your date to trusted contacts, so they know where you are and who you’re with. You can update these details in real-time, right from the Bumble app.

– Keep it kind: We’ve enhanced our Review Before You Send feature so now it can help you out on chat messages, too. If you’re about to send a message that doesn’t meet our guidelines, we’ll give you a chance to reconsider and edit it. 

All these features are free and are designed to make your Bumble experience feel more personalized, enjoyable, and respectful. Update now to try it out!

name: Bumble for Friends
ASO_15_last_update_as: To be honest, everything is kinda new here. Say hello to our new dedicated friendship app - Bumble For Friends. It’s a bit like Bumble, but for finding friends and creating meaningful connections with people near you. We’ve got fun new profile features and important safety features to make it easy for people to show up in a way that’s genuine and true to themselves. We’re also creating a community centered around kindness, because kindness is kinda what we do. So, whether you’re looking for new friends to hit the town with, or to try that new workout class with, Bumble For Friends is here to help. Start a chat, meet up IRL, and find your kinda people.

name: Call of Duty Mobile
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Call of Duty®: Mobile Season 5: Primal Reckoning is here! Nature is evolving, and apex predators are taking over. Equip the Mythic VMP and unlock new Secret Cache rewards. It's time to adapt or be left behind!

MYTHIC VMP
Celebrate the arrival of the newest SMG with this beautiful Mythic skin! The Mythic VMP channels a dark and natural power that’s guaranteed to grow on you! Embrace its natural strength and bloom into a champion!

SECRET CACHE REWARD REFRESH
Secret Caches just got their first-ever refresh, and the new rewards are next level. Score the free Legendary AK47 – ICB Rifle and more. Lock in to start unlocking!

NEW BATTLE PASSES
Packed with apex predator–themed Operators, weapons, and more, the Season 5 Battle Pass has everything you need to unleash your wild side. Earn free rewards like the new VMP go premium to unlock Gustavo – Viciousness and more. Every tier pushes you closer to the top!

NEW BATTLE PASS VAULTS
All aboard! Season 5 is bringing back the fan-favorite Battle Pass from 2022’s Season 8: Train to Nowhere! Don’t miss out—grab these items before the train leaves the station, and stay tuned to see which Battle Passes will return in Season 6!

This season marks a new evolution of content in a world where only the strong survive—are you ready to adapt and prove you're fit for the challenge?

name: MarginNote 4
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Urgently fixed the edit text selection bug in the previous version.
Added Japanese localization.
————————————————
New Features & Optimizations:

Supports importing Office documents: Includes Word, PPT, and Excel files, meeting the need for unified management of multi-format materials.
White Space view switching: The "Normal," "Page Margin," and "Collapsed" modes can now be quickly switched via options in the Document Management panel.
Toolbar button adjustment: The "Add Comment" button in the black toolbar is changed to "Text (White Space/Comment)" to distinguish it from the "Add as Comment" function.
Improved Notebook & Handwriting Layer UI: Optimized the interface for switching and managing between the Document Notebook and Handwriting layer, enhancing smoothness and clarity of operation.
Mind Map & Document Sync Toggle: Added a position sync toggle button on the Mind Map / Document splitter bar for one-click synchronization of document and mind map positioning.
Enhanced Markdown linking:
Supports using [[ or 【【 followed by keywords to search for cards.
Supports using ]] after typing to create a new card directly, generating an inline card link, improving knowledge organization and citation efficiency.
Optimized Study Set Document Addition: Improved the entry point for adding documents to Study Sets, making the process more convenient and smoother.

Fixes:

Fixed and improved Baidu Translation: Enhanced translation experience and stability.
Fixed MAX permission error: Resolved an issue where Pro users switching to a sub-mind map or opening the Group Board in Document Mode would incorrectly receive a prompt requiring MAX permissions.
Fixed Apple Pencil Pro display anomaly: Fixed a UI display issue caused by pressing the Apple Pencil Pro.
Fixed text selection issue with Auto-Join: Fixed an issue where canceling White Space mode prevented selected text from being added to the mind map despite "Auto-Join to Mind Map" being enabled.
Fixed excerpt tooltip text: Corrected the erroneous description "摘录" (Excerpt) for the eraser tool function.
Fixed card view document navigation: Fixed an issue in the Card Kanban view where clicking a card and then navigating to the document view prevented closing the document to return to the card view.
Fixed missing expand button: Fixed an issue where the top expand button didn't appear after collapsing long content.
Fixed misplaced White Space button: Fixed an issue where the right-side buttons in the White Space panel became misplaced when zooming a PDF while the panel was open.
Fixed duplicate 'White Space' menu item: Resolved an issue causing two "White Space" options to appear in the document menu bar on iOS 26.

Special Note:

Major upgrades are coming soon to the benefits and features included with the MAX version. Stay tuned!

**What’s New**
We’ve been busy behind the scenes making OneDrive even better. Here’s what’s new and improved:

**New**
Shared Folders in Folder Picker: You can now access shared folders directly from the folder picker—making it easier to organize and collaborate on the go.

**Fixed & Improved**
- Uploads in the Files Provider Extension are now reliable—no more duplicates or failed attempts
- Tapping quickly on a photo no longer opens it multiple times
- File details now display correctly when using \“Open in New Window\”
- Album experience is smoother with fixed shimmer effects
- Folder picker rename and scan issues have been resolved

Thanks for using OneDrive! We’re always working to improve your experience. If you run into any issues, just shake your device and tap \“Send Feedback.\”

\*These notes were generated using Copilot

name: Moonlight
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Version 4.0.3 fixes a graphics glitch when using the Marble tile art.

Version 4.0.2 fixes a bug where the background would not change in Relaxation or Puzzle modes.

Version 4.0.1 contains some small improvements to version 4.0 based on user feedback:
- If your Scramble high score is above two million, you can now start a new Scramble game on progressively higher levels above 50. This change is to support very high level players.
- On Scramble levels above 100, Tilebot may pause slightly less after reshuffling. This is a correction to the game play balance for very high levels.
- Tilebot’s label now indicates when Tilebot is paused and for how long.
- Small cosmetic improvements.

Version 4.0 is updated to better support the latest versions of iOS and iPadOS, to keep Moonlight Mahjong working well into the future. There are new backgrounds, and Tilebot is now slowed down slightly when the player makes matches, giving the player a chance to catch up or get ahead if they’re “on a roll.”

ASO_15_last_update_as:
This update brings AI-powered prompting with contextual note integration, and powerful search improvements including exact match and exclusion options.

(Note: We have added some additional fixes since the last release)

NEW FEATURES:
1. AI Prompting with Context (⌘O)
- View AI responses in a preview window before inserting or replacing text
- Add notes (daily and regular) and folders as context to your prompts
- Generate summaries, create tables, and ask questions about your notes with contextual awareness

2. Advanced Search Capabilities
- Exact match searches using quotes (e.g., "sun" finds only standalone words)
- Exclusion filters with hyphen prefix (e.g., #pending -#waiting)
- Combine keywords with exclusions for precise filtering

IMPROVEMENTS & FIXES:
- Resolved table positioning issues
- Fixed reference updates when note titles change
- Fixed task loading in sidebar "Notes" heading
- Addressed teamspace sync deadlocks during extended sessions

Additional fixes:
- Fixed AI properties generation
- Fixed toolbar not updating in tables
- Fixed curly quotes breaking templates (thanks to @dwertheimer for the quick fix)
- Fixed command bar search keyword "y" always returning yearly notes
- Added RTL setting to the Editor settings forcing the full UI to switch to RTL after a restart
- Attempt to fix a crash occurring with iCloud Drive syncing

If you enjoy using NotePlan, please consider rating it or leaving a review. Your support helps us continue improving the app. Thank you!

name: Photoshop Camera
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Swap Outfit: Transform your outfit instantly with AI and choose your perfect style. Available only on iPhone.

AI Background: Replace your background with unique settings - such as Nature, Liminal Spaces, Fantasy. Available only on iPhone.

Create your own stickers with AI: Use the Generate Stickers feature to customize to your own taste and make collages that feel so you!

Play with proportions: Reshape or resize specific objects in your pic!

Touch out the mess The Heal tool is now in Editor, perfect for scrubbing out those stains, healing blemishes, erasing distractions, and more!

Generative Expand: Now you can make your photos the exact proportions that you need. Make your photos a perfect fit for every timeline, dump, or project. This is currently available only on iPhone.

Animated Stickers: Choose from millions of animated stickers to bring your edits to life!

Blush: Got you blushin’? The newest addition to our makeup bag includes 13 blush categories in customizable shades.

Face Paint: Get your face painted or a new tattoo without commitment. Use our new Face Paint tools to try before you buy IRL, or to serve a new look for the day.

Imagine with Text to Image: Take your expression further by turning text prompts into eye-catching images, powered by Adobe Firefly. This is currently available only on iPhone.

A new world of editing: Use Generative Fill powered by Adobe Firefly to easily add elements to your image or quickly remove objects from the background. This is currently available only on iPhone.

AI-Powered Camera Lenses: See life through a new lens with over 100 aesthetic, Insta-worthy AI-powered filters and effects. Preview and capture artistic shots of friends, food, scenery, and yourself!

Find the perfect theme: Search and select themes based on your aesthetic or favorite elements! Are you a western gothic? A pink plazacore aesthete? Or do you prefer the film look? Skip the scrolling and try the search bar.

Video Magic Has Arrived! Trim clips, adjust speed and resize for high resolution video exports. Add thousands of audio tracks directly integrated from Adobe Stock to elevate your edit. Turn photo dumps into videos or make a trailer of your life with new video editing tools.

Eye Makeup: Make them pop! Whether you're serving drama, a natural look or having a vibrant moment, our NEW eye makeup tool has you covered. Try it out!

Lipstick Glow-Up! You can now tweak the intensity of lipstick color with an easy slider. We also recently added more lipstick styles, enabling users to find just the right tone and texture.

Auto-Selection Magic: Multiple objects within your image are pre-populated to choose and selectively apply adjustments.

Animation Effects in Editor: Animations entered the chat. Try the new animation effects in Editor.

name: Plex
apple_store_found_name: Plex: Watch Live TV and Movies
ASO_15_last_update_as:
NEW:
- Support pinch gesture to change player display mode.

FIXES:
- Activity push notifications were not routing to the correct screen.
- Anamorphic video would look squished and not the proper aspect ratio.
- Browse Libraries hub should not be first visible hub.
- Fixed missing guide airings for PMS Live TV on initial load in some situations.
- Improve scrolling performance on list and grid screens.
- Picture-in-Picture button could display on unsupported content.
- Play queue would not continue when the device was locked.
- Player: Live TV position could keep resetting during playback.
- Player: OSD couldn't be opened with accessibility actions during playback.
- Player: playback could seek back to initial position when changing playback speed.
- Player: prevent crash using external subtitles.
- Player: skip credits marker could be triggered immediately.
- Plex home settings had inconsistent styles with the rest of settings.
- Search screen was making unnecessary requests, slowing down the initial load
- Some PGS subtitles would not be positioned correctly on-screen.
- Subtitles would render off-screen when the display mode was not set to "Letterbox".
- Title on modal screens cutt-off to soon.
- Watch from start would not cast while connected.
- When no selected search servers, an informative message should display.
- Wrong title would flash briefly on My Services and Friends pages.

name: Plexamp
ASO_15_last_update_as:
*Added*

- Downmixing to stereo (new playback setting).
- Preserving multi-channel audio when converting (new Downmix to Stereo conversion setting).
- Ability to star (highly rate) tracks from the lock screen.
- New visualizers: Aurora, Disco Ball and Hyper Paint.

*Fixed*

- Tracks could end prematurely.
- Playback start could be slower than normal in some cases.
- Seeking could lead to track skipping.
- Channel mapping for surround Opus modes was incorrect.
- Crash from misformed/missing port in server connection URI.
- Get rid of confusing incorrect sample/bit-rate display for audio output.
- Codec badge could incorrect show 24-bit.
- Editing playlist filters only worked on the playlist screen.
- Fix an issue when after seeking, a track could buffer indefinitely.
- DSD tracks could result in an inappropriately large mixer sample rate.
- DSD tracks wouldn't display properly with visualizers.
- Bump max RAM cache size to 16 MB.

name: Portal
ASO_15_last_update_as:
As the leaves turn and the air grows crisp, we’re excited to bring you some fresh updates to complement this season of change. This release includes support for some bright new lights, compatibility with the latest Apple devices, and a helpful notification fix!


*Nanoleaf Blocks Support*
You can now connect Portal to Nanoleaf’s brand-new Blocks, giving you even more ways to light up your space for the ultimate immersive experience.

The folks at Nanoleaf have kindly provided all Portal Premium Members with an exclusive discount. Please head to ‘Lighting Settings’ > ‘Add Connection’ in-app for more details.

*Support for iPhone 16 & AirPods (4th Gen)*
We’ve ensured that Portal is fully optimised for the new iPhone 16 (incl. Plus), iPhone 16 Pro (incl. Max) and AirPods (4th Gen) so you can enjoy Portal seamlessly on all the latest Apple devices.

*Dynamic Island Fix*
We’ve fixed an issue where the timer and alarm notifications were being partially obscured on some devices with a dynamic island. Everything is now crystal clear!

As always, we’re incredibly grateful for your feedback and support. If there’s anything we can do to enhance your experience, please drop us a line at [hello@portal.app](mailto:hello@portal.app). We’d love to hear from you :)

Thanks again,

Andy, Alex, Nick, Stu & Tim - Team Portal.

name: Siralim Ultimate
ASO_15_last_update_as:
- 8 specializations have been added to the game: Toxicologist, Engineer, Shadowbringer, Demonologist, Mime, Graveborn, Gladiator, and Brewmaster. You can unlock them via new projects.
- 2 Challenge Specializations have been added to the game: Pariah and Deprived. Instead of providing you with bonuses, these specializations make you significantly weaker. However, if you're able to Ascend them, you'll earn a special reward. These specializations' projects are only available after you unlock the Gate of the Gods.
- Additional content related to the new specializations has been added: 120 achievements, 30 costumes, 10 skins, new anointments, and more.
- 10 spells have been added to the game. These were added to extend support for under-utilized debuffs such as Poison and Cursed.
- 11 minions have been added to the game. Many of these work much differently than normal minions (and most are exclusive to the new Demonologist specialization), so check out the Codex for more information.
- Each week, a new buff will activate that either increases your Card Drop Rate, Skin Drop Rate, Nether Stone Drop Rate, or Bonus Loot. You can see which buff is active by interacting with the new Calendar decoration in your castle (found in the Utilities/NPC category).
- You can now choose to consume 1, 2, or 3 tickets at the Gambling Dwarves. This multiplies your rewards by the number of tickets spent and also counts as playing that many times for the sake of Prophecies and Achievements.
- The following new macro conditions have been added to the Macro Editor: Resurrection Count, Death Count, Is Not At Top of Timeline, Is Not At Bottom of Timeline, Has Trait, and Doesn't Have Trait. Note for those last two: prior to this patch, many traits were not recorded in your Codex (False Gods, God Battles, etc), so you'll need to encounter these traits in battles before seeing them appear on the list.
- You can sort Nether Stones by Locked and Unlocked in all interfaces.
- You can now rename your Nether Stones at the Blacksmith using the new "Etch" function.
- Most Arsenal and Booze spells have been changed/buffed to be more useful.
- Most Exotic creatures' traits and backer traits are now more powerful.
- The Lister and Jotun fights no longer use battle fatigue as their metric for victory and are instead based on the number of turns creatures have taken in battle (24 total turns for Lister, 36 total turns for Jotun). The intent of this change is to shorten these fights under normal circumstances, make them a bit more predictable, and prevent players from feeling like they need to fish for certain realm properties to defeat Jotun in a reasonable amount of time.
- None of the False Gods are immune to Blighted anymore, and False God self-healing from their innate traits no longer counts as healing effects.
- Cabalist's "Flow of Magic" perk has been revamped because it was simply an inferior version of this specialization's "Prism" perk.
- Enemies can no longer spawn with the "Saving Grace" spell. Note that they can still acquire this spell in battle through other effects.
- Numbers greater than or equal to 1 quadrillion are now expressed using scientific notation. This means that all numbers can now be displayed, so the game won't default to "?!?!" if you reach too high of a number.
- Massive optimizations to make the game run smoother, especially in battles that drag on for a long time.

- Tons of bug fixes.

Hello and welcome back to SKRWT v1.5! 

This one is for you - we are finally releasing an update that is fixing all issues - SKRWT v1.5 should now be running smoothly on your devices again. We want to apologize for making you wait for so long. We are back at it and hope you like what we did with v1.5:

	•	Fixed bugs and big back-end improvements
	•	Removed all in-app purchases and made them FREE
	•	A complete layout re-design

Yes, SKRWT v1.5 comes with a new and modern look + feel! In addition to that we have removed the in-app purchases so that MRRW & 4PNTS are now for free and part of the whole SKRWT experience.

Thank you for sticking around! If you like the update please consider giving it a rating - this actually helps a lot and let us know if you still have issues, comments or ideas!

Stay save & stay sane!

Love & Symmetry
SKRWT

We hereby declare today as the first day of Tezza Summer and to celebrate we are launching 3 of the best film emulations we've ever made. Solaré 17, Moka V, and Retra... think of these beauties as your Summer toolkit. We can't wait to see the art that you create all Summer long! Update and enjoy :) 
--
Solaré 17

Electric blues, sun crushed tones, Solaré 17 takes you to that glossy, golden era of 90s swim campaigns—vibrant, textured, and effortless. Summer doesn’t last forever.. but Solaré 17 does, and that honestly might be just as good.
--
Moka V

That post-sun, just-showered warmth—skin kissed golden, hair still ocean-salty, everything glowing. That’s Moka V. Toasty, warm, wrapped in a vintage haze. A summer memory waiting to happen.
--
Retra

Retra is a golden blur of a memory, the way summer look when you close your eyes and imagine it. The edges are soft, sprinkled with rays of sunshine, beautiful grain dampening the harsh noon sunlight, the subtle imperfections that make the moment feel real, instantly nostalgic.

name: Whiteout Survival
ASO_15_last_update_as:
[New Content]
1. New Feature: Alliance Auto-Help added to the Ultra Value Monthly Card.

[Optimization & Adjustment]
1. Chief Gear Upgrade Adjusted: Legendary Star Rating upgrades now split into multiple stages without increasing total cost, improving the ascension experience. In the meantime, Legendary Chief Gear now includes a new Stat Bonus: “Troops Deployment Capacity”.
2. Daily Missions Optimization: More activity points are earned from completing "Upgrade 1 Building", "Research 1 Technology", and "Fight in 1 or 5 Arena Challenges". New Daily Missions added for The Labyrinth and Pet Adventure to help Chiefs better plan daily events, enhancing the overall gaming experience.
3. Daybreak Island Optimization: New Basic Decoration "Azure Fence" added.
4. Frostdragon Tyrant Optimization: While keeping the Battlefield opening hours unchanged, the time to vie for control of the Capital is shortened to 5 hours. Rally time options for the Frostdragon Capital and Stone Spires have been adjusted — 3-minute Rally added, 30-minute Rally removed — to help Chiefs plan more flexibly.
5. Frostdragon Tyrant Prediction Optimization: Before the event begins, Chiefs can now modify their predictions at any time, allowing for more flexible and accurate decisions.
6. Recruit Hero Optimization: Enhanced recruitment experience when fewer than 10 Recruitment keys available.
7. State Banner Optimization: Some State Banners now feature dynamic effects.
8. President Declaration Optimization: After the update, new Declarations set by Presidents/Supreme Presidents will support the Like feature.
9. Appointment Optimization: A blocklist feature has been added. Presidents/Supreme Presidents can now add specific players to an Application Blocklist, preventing these Chiefs from applying for position.
10. Skin Display Optimization: The display interface has been adjusted to hide skins from time-limited events that are currently unavailable, streamlining the visual experience.
11. March Skin Optimization: Improved the visual effects of certain March Skins under different graphics settings to ensure optimal performance across all quality modes.
12. Chat Optimization: The recent contacts list limit has been increased to 200.
13. Snowbusters Optimization: New levels added and existing content adjusted for increased challenge and more fun, improving the handling and overall experience. The method for obtaining themed Map Collection Skins has also been optimized to be awarded via Star Rewards.
14. Chief Profile Optimization: The initial State number is now displayed, and Chiefs can select whether to show or hide it.
15. Mail Capacity Increased: Storage limit for battle related mails has been increased to 500 for a better battle history review and management experience.
16. Mercenary Prestige Rewards Optimization: Adjusted the participation reward for defeating Phaethon Captain. “Epic Hero Shard” is replaced with “100 Enhancement XP Component”.
17. Alliance Championship Optimization: After the update, Alliance Championship participants will receive a new KO Reward, the “Treasure Box”, which may contain Mythic General Hero Shards and other valuable Items. Please note: Battles happened before the update will not receive this change in reward.
18. Event Rewards Update: As the state progresses, rewards for the “Crazy Joe” Alliance Leaderboard and “Fishing Tournament” Sunken Treasure Hunt will be updated accordingly.
19. Custom Avatar Optimization: The Preview Interface for uploading custom Avatars has been improved. Chiefs can now see how their Avatar Frame and Custom Avatar will look together before uploading.

name: Zello
ASO_15_last_update_as: In this release, we made it easier to stay in touch and disconnect when needed. A new availability scheduling feature helps work users automatically silence messages during off hours – no manual toggling required. We also refreshed the sign-up and permissions screens for a smoother start, improved how contacts and invites are handled, and made voice messages and notifications more reliable across different scenarios. Plus, we fixed bugs to ensure the app runs dependably in the background and throughout your day.

name: Zenless Zone Zero
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Version 2.0 "Where Clouds Embrace the Dawn" Out Now!
Where the mind flows, all things become clear.
Impurities fade away, leaving no trace, no shadow.
Peace returns to the land of Waifei.
"If only she hadn't broken her promise to me on that day when the old capital fell..."
[New Characters]
• S-Rank Agent Yixuan (Rupture - Auric Ink)
The 13th High Preceptor of Yunkui Summit and a Void Hunter-level investigator officially approved by Mayor Mayflower. Her casual approach to matters means that even when teaching by example, disciples can only guess at their shifu's true intentions.
• S-Rank Agent Ju Fufu (Stun - Fire)
Though small in stature, she's the senior disciple at Yunkui Summit and one of the first students of Yixuan. A rare Tiger Thiren from New Eridu, she may look like a sweet and cuddly young lady on the outside, but deep down she harbors dreams of becoming a mighty tiger hero.
• A-Rank Agent Pan Yinhu (Defense - Physical)
A panda Thiren and one of the disciples of Yunkui Summit, he serves as Suibian Temple's head chef and finance manager, wielding impressive martial arts skills. Despite his past as a wanderer, he's deeply loyal to those close to him. Senior Yinhu will always support his own, no questions asked!
[Returning Characters]
• S-Rank Agent Astra Yao (Support - Ether)
A superstar from the Stars of Lyra and Ridu's most iconic singer, she captivates the hearts and minds of countless concertgoers with her extraordinary voice and moving performances on stage. When it comes to her art, she doesn't shy away from a challenge, and revels in exploring the boundaries of music, weaving new possibilities out of melody and inspiration.
• S-Rank Agent Caesar (Defense - Physical)
As the leader of the Sons of Calydon, she is a monarch in the making who is quick-tempered but open to valid suggestions. She often comes up with intriguing yet flawed plans. Once she sets her sights on something, she never backs down. After the events of the Tour de Inferno, she is now focused on stepping up as the new Overlord.
[New W-Engines]
• The S-Rank W-Engine Qingming Birdcage (Rupture) can be obtained through the Dissonant Sonata Signal Search.
• The S-Rank W-Engine Roaring Fur-nace (Stun) can be obtained through upcoming Dazzling Choir Signal Search.
• The A-Rank W-Engine Tremor Trigram Vessel (Defense) can be obtained through the Dissonant Sonata and Vibrant Resonance Signal Searches. After Version 2.0, it will be permanently added to the Star-Studded Cast Stable Channel in Version 2.1, and can also be obtained through Signal Search in 
[New Bangboo]
• The S-Rank Bangboo Belion can be obtained through the An Outstanding Partner Signal Search.
[New Story]
• Main Story Season 2 Chapter 1 "Where Clouds Embrace the Dawn"
The vestiges of a past calamity herald the beginning of another.
• Ju Fufu's Agent Story "Legend of the Tiger Warrior!"
Ferocious among the forests, and vigilant in the shadows. Watch out, evildoers, for the great Master Fufu will punish the wicked!
• Agent Trust Events and Quality Time Events
New Agent Trust Events and Quality Time Events for Yixuan, Ju Fufu, and Pan Yinhu.
[New events]
• Festival Channel
Log in to claim Standard S-Rank Agent ×1, Standard S-Rank W-Engine ×1, Polychrome ×1,600, and an anniversary avatar and title!
First-purchase double bonus will be reset for all top-up tiers in the Monochrome Market.
— Good morning once again, New Eridu.
• Failume Gift
During the event period, log in for a total of 7 days to get Encrypted Master Tape ×10.
A new chapter begins — check out this special welcome gift from Failume Heights!
• En-Normous Surprise!
Log in for 7 days to receive Encrypted Master Tape ×10 and Boopon ×10!

See in-game announcements for other updates.

name: Zoho Connect
ASO_15_last_update_as:
Let's see what's new we have this time.

Private Dashboard
See your own activity in a space made just for you. Customize this dashboard with widgets you want.

Group Dashboard
Keep an eye on your group's activity at a glance. Personalize the dashboard to show tasks, forums, leaderboards, and more in a way that suits your team.

Sample data
View pre-populated data for each module such as events, groups, feeds, town halls, manuals, and forums to explore the platform better.

File upload and download policy
File upload/download settings set by admins in the web app are now automatically applied to the mobile app.

Try all these features and have a happy Connect-ing experience!
